# Prince Makavana

> Personal portfolio website for Prince Makavana, a frontend-focused web developer.

## Site

- Canonical URL: https://princemakavana.com/
- Type: Single-page portfolio
- Owner: Prince Makavana

## Summary

Prince Makavana is a web developer with experience building frontend and full-stack web applications using React, Vue, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Firebase, MongoDB, LangChain, Pinecone, AWS, and Google Cloud Platform.

The website highlights:

- Skills and technology stack
- Selected projects
- Professional experience
- Testimonials and recommendations
- Contact links

## Key Sections

- Home: https://princemakavana.com/#home
- Skills: https://princemakavana.com/#skills
- Projects: https://princemakavana.com/#projects
- Experience: https://princemakavana.com/#experience
- Contact: https://princemakavana.com/#contact

## Selected Projects

- QA Support Bot: https://qa-support-bot.princemakavana.com
- Apy Material: https://www.gtuapymaterials.com
- AI-Powered Document Analysis App: https://gemini-ai-vertex-demo.vercel.app/
- Codechef Chapter: https://codechef-gec-rajkot-chapter.github.io/main/
- indi Water: https://indiwater3.web.app/
- Scientific Calculator: https://princesimform.github.io/scientific-calculator/
- Expense Tracker: https://expense-tracker-910c0.web.app/
